changes.comment: Major release: schema-first validation with full TypeScript type inference via v factory; primitives (string, number, boolean, date, null, undefined, unknown, never, any) with chainable refinements (min, max, email, url, regex, and more); complex types (object with strict/partial/pick/omit, array, tuple, record, union, intersect, variant discriminated unions, enum, nativeEnum, literal, instanceof); modifiers (optional, nullable, nullish); coerce namespace for type-coercing schemas; lazy() for recursive schemas; ValidationError with path-aware issues, flatten(), and static is() guard; zero dependencies
